findings.evidence: AC-7 grep gate still finds Material Icons imports in android/app/src/main, e.g. `import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons` and `import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.Warning`. Additional matches exist in IconSymbol.kt, MapControls.kt, Header.kt, CaptionInput.kt, and others.
findings.fix: Remove or replace all `androidx.compose.material.icons` and `Icons.Filled`/`Icons.Outlined` references under android/app/src/main, or expand/split scope before claiming AC-7.

findings.evidence: Icon sizing and stroke are parsed directly from `semantic.tokens.json` via `IconTokenMetrics.fromJson` and `rememberIconTokenMetrics`, then consumed by LSIcon at LSIcon.kt:39-55. The requirement says sizes must resolve through `LaneShadowTheme.sizing.icon.*` and stroke through `LaneShadowTheme.icon.stroke.width`.
findings.fix: Expose/consume the generated theme token API for icon sizing and stroke width, then have IconSize and LSIcon resolve from that API instead of parsing assets inside the atom.

findings.evidence: Delivered vector resources contain hardcoded `android:width="24dp"`, `android:height="24dp"`, and hardcoded colors such as `#FF000000`; LSIcon does not use these resources, so they are stale deliverables that violate the no-hardcoded icon-size/color constraints if retained as the vector implementation.
findings.fix: Remove unused drawable resources or regenerate them as a compliant resource implementation with token-controlled size/color/stroke behavior.

findings.evidence: Provided validation output does not include `cd android && ./gradlew :app:assembleRelease` plus the APK `com.nativesandbox` unzip/grep check required by AC-9.
findings.fix: Run the AC-9 release hygiene gate and include the passing output, or fix any release packaging issue it reveals.

requirements.evidence: LSIcon.kt exists and tests assert semantics, but implementation resolves size/stroke from asset-parsed IconTokenMetrics rather than LaneShadowTheme.sizing.icon.md and LaneShadowTheme.icon.stroke.width.
requirements.remediation: Resolve Md size and stroke from the theme token API required by the task.

requirements.evidence: IconSize.kt:23 maps cases from IconTokenMetrics; IconSize.kt:46-75 parses semantic.tokens.json directly.
IconColor.kt:34 maps IconColor.Signal to GeneratedTokens.color.Signal.default; supplied unit/compile output passed.
LSIcon.kt has an exhaustive IconName.pathSpecs `when`; LSIconCatalogInstrumentationTest iterates IconName.entries and androidTest Kotlin compilation passed in supplied output.
LSIcon.kt:32-35 exposes `color: IconColor`; LSIconTypeSafetyTest checks no LSIcon overload has a raw Compose Color parameter; supplied unit output passed.
LSIconStories.kt registers `atoms.icon.catalog` and `atoms.icon.colorOverrides` with `ComponentTier.Atom`; local grep gate passed.
Local rg found Material Icons references under android/app/src/main, including ConnectionBanner.kt:7 and IconSymbol.kt:3.
requirements.remediation: Remove all forbidden Material Icons references from android/app/src/main.

requirements.evidence: Supplied validation output for `pnpm icons:check` exits 0 and reports the icon catalog valid; local rerun was blocked by read-only sandbox IPC permissions.
No supplied release APK inspection output for `grep -c com.nativesandbox`; reviewer did not run release build because the pass is read-only.
requirements.remediation: Run `cd android && ./gradlew :app:assembleRelease && [ "$(unzip -l app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk | grep -c com.nativesandbox)" = "0" ]` and fix failures.

summary: NEEDS_FIXES: AC-7 fails outright, icon size/stroke resolution bypasses the required theme token API, unused hardcoded drawable resources remain, and the release hygiene gate is missing.
